resource.name: FHIR Course CapabilityStatement
resource.description: FHIR server shall behave in accordance of this capability statement.

resource.name: FHIR Course Extension Patient Nationality
resource.description: The nationality of the patient. This element is to report patient nationality as per the ISO 3166-3 Standard , 2nd edition , 3-character alphabetic codes.

resource.name: FHIR course Patient Profile 01
resource.description: The patient profile to validate resource instance participants need to create for session 2: Patient resource Assignment.

resource.name: ISO 3166-1 Alpha-3 Country Codes
resource.description: This CodeSystem resource represents the ISO 3166-1 standard, 2020 edition for country codes, specifically the three-character (alpha-3) codes. It is intended to be a complete and canonical representation of the standard as a FHIR resource.

resource.name: John Cena
resource.description: sample Patient resource instance to test the FHIR Course Chapter 2: Writing Patient resource instance against the  Patient profile.

resource.name: MyPatient
resource.description: An example profile of the Patient resource.

resource.name: Nationality (ISO 3166-1 Alpha-3 Subset)
resource.description: ValueSet for the Countries represented using ISO 3166-1 alpha-3 codes.

resource.name: Patient Contact Relationship Codes
resource.description: Local codes used to describe patient contact relationships for course examples.

resource.name: Patient MRN Identifier Namespace
resource.description: Namespace definition for patient MRN identifier system used in this IG.

resource.name: PatientExample
resource.description: An example of a patient with a license to krill.

resource.name: Practitioner Example 01
resource.description: Example practitioner with NPI identifier for sample references.

resource.name: Practitioner Example 02
resource.description: Example practitioner with resource id for sample references.

resource.name: Practitioner Identifier Namespace
resource.description: Namespace definition for practitioner identifier system used in this IG.
